# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import type { NextApiRequest, NextApiResponse } from 'next'

async function streamResponse(req: NextApiRequest, res: NextApiResponse) {
  const readableStreamBody = req.body as ReadableStream<Uint8Array>
  const writableStreamResponse = res.writeHead(200).writable

  readableStreamBody.pipeTo(writableStreamResponse, {
    end: false, // Don't finish the read stream until the response is finished
  })

  writableStreamResponse.on('finish', () => {
    res.end() // End the response when the stream is finished
  })
}

export default (req, res) => {
  if (req.method !== 'POST') return res.status(405).json({ error: 'Method not allowed' })

  streamResponse(req, res)
}
